news.t: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands ETF Suite with Corporate Culture Leaders Strategy
Harbor Capital Advisors Launches Its First ETFs; Managed by Scientific Fixed Income Specialist BlueCove

overview.description: The Harbor Ares Systematic Multi-Sector Income ETF (SIFI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in a wide array of fixed income securities of any maturity and credit quality selected using a proprietary quantitative method. SIFI was launched on Sep 14, 2021 and is issued by Harbor.

data.title: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands ETF Suite with Corporate Culture Leaders Strategy
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors, Inc. (“Harbor Capital”) today launched the Harbor Corporate Culture Leaders ETF (HAPY), which aims to capture the alpha generated by companies with t...

data.title: Harbor Capital Advisors Launches Its First ETFs; Managed by Scientific Fixed Income Specialist BlueCove
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors makes ETF debut with two new scientific fixed income strategies.
